The text below is a guideline, and can be deleted before posting the PR.

The code of Yafc is complicated enough that we want to make it simpler. In other words, if your feature increases the overall complexity of code, then we require a Feature Design issue with your proposal, where we can discuss if this feature can be added to Yafc. If you make a PR without the Feature Design issue, then please write in the PR Description what refactors you have done in the PR to _not increase_ the overall code complexity of Yafc.

A list of nice-to-have things:
* A changelog entry.
* The link from the PR to the issue that it fixes.
* A description of what testing was done.
